name: Churchill Capital Corp XI
business: Churchill Capital Corp XI is a blank check company incorporated in the Cayman Islands on June 4, 2025, formed for the purpose of effecting a business combination with one or more businesses. It has no operating history and has not generated any revenues. As of the date of the report, it has not selected any specific business combination target.

catalysts.event: Deadline to complete initial business combination
catalysts.sentence: We must complete our initial Business Combination by (i) December 18, 2027, the end of our Combination Period, which is 24 months from the closing of our Initial Public Offering (or March 18, 2028 if we have executed a letter of intent, agreement in principle or definitive agreement for an initial Business Combination by December 18, 2027), (ii) such earlier liquidation date as our Board may approve or (iii) such later date as our shareholders may approve pursuant to the Amended and Restated Articles.
